/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/HAFFMAN.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HAFFMAN.dir/node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HAFFMAN.dir/code.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HAFFMAN.dir/huffman.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HAFFMAN.dir/aux_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HAFFMAN.dir/writebit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HAFFMAN.dir/ReadBit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HAFFMAN.dir/Huffman_encoding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HAFFMAN.dir/Huffman_decoding.cpp.o -o HAFFMAN
